rationale.D1: Confirmed no `interface *IO` exists; instead every mechanism (Elevator, Pivot, Wrist, Coraler, Kicker, Rollers, Climb) extends the generic `TalonFXSubsystem` abstract base with @AutoLog inputs — a library-grade reusable base (D1 L2.5) but no swappable Sim/Real implementation pair.
rationale.D2: Confirmed Superstructure is a real coordinator with goal-request methods (scoreL4, stow, intake, handoff) that fan out to subsystems and guard transitions via shouldClear/clearElevatorGoingUpNoDown checks, not merely a holder — level 3.
rationale.D3: Confirmed maple-sim (ironmaple) drivetrain physics wired in Robot.simulationPeriodic and SwerveDrive; ElevatorSim is commented out and no mechanism physics sim exists, so drivetrain-only whole-robot sim rates at 2.5, not full L3.
rationale.D4: Confirmed no src/test directory; CI workflow runs `./gradlew build` only, not `test`; zero test files or assert calls — level 0.
rationale.D5: Confirmed Robot extends LoggedRobot, TalonFXSubsystem calls Logger.processInputs for every subsystem through the shared base (Elevator/Pivot/Wrist/etc. all covered), and Logger.recordOutput used throughout — full AdvantageKit coverage, level 3.
rationale.D6: Confirmed choreo.Choreo imported and followChoreoPath called on real trajectory names (s3_to_e1, e1_to_src, etc.) in AutoCommands.java, and AutoBuilder.pathfindToPose used in AutoDrive for on-the-fly pose alignment — level 3.
rationale.D7: Confirmed AprilTagCamera interface with Limelight and PhotonVision implementations, distance-weighted std-dev tuning in both impls, addVisionMeasurement called in SwerveDrive with per-measurement stdDevs, and TimeInterpolatableBuffer in lib/tracking/RobotTracker — fused filtered estimation, level 3.
rationale.D8: Confirmed CI (build.yml runs gradlew build + spotless.yml enforces spotless) and 4 tracked seasons; the `library/` folder contains only pre-2022 demos (not a maintained cross-season lib), and 2025 repo has no README — CI + process artifacts earn level 3, but not 4.

src/main/java/team3647/frc2025/subsystems/Elevator.java:20 — public class Elevator extends TalonFXSubsystem (no IO interface, hardware directly in base)

D3: src/main/java/team3647/frc2025/subsystems/Elevator.java:25 — ElevatorSim field commented out, no mechanism physics sim

src/main/java/team3647/frc2025/robot/RobotTracker.java:26 — Logger.recordOutput for superstructure state every periodic

src/main/java/team3647/frc2025/Util/AutoDrive.java — AutoBuilder.pathfindToPose used for on-the-fly reef alignment
